name: useTextareaAutosize
description: Hook that automatically adjusts textarea height based on content
examples: const { ref, value, setValue, clear } = useTextareaAutosize('initial');
const { ref, value, setValue, clear } = useTextareaAutosize();

parameters.name: options.initialValue
parameters.description: The initial value for the textarea

source.source: * @param {string} [options.initialValue] The initial value for the textarea

tokens.name: [options.initialValue]
tokens.description: The initial value for the textarea

parameters.name: options.onResize
parameters.description: Callback function called when the textarea size changes

source.source: * @param {Function} [options.onResize] Callback function called when the textarea size changes

tokens.description: Callback function called when the textarea size changes

returns.description: object containing value, setValue and clear
